category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Zimbabwe (SAZ standards, import inspection, and energy labelling) requirements.

title.en: China-to-Zimbabwe Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入津巴布韦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入辛巴威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Zimbabwe market-access requirements: SAZ / ZWS standards (adopting IEC/SANS), import conformity inspection, energy labelling / MEPS programmes, ZWS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, and R-600a refrigerant handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与津巴布韦市场准入要求对照：SAZ / ZWS标准（采用IEC/SANS）、进口符合性检验、能效标识/MEPS计划、ZWS/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求及R-600a制冷剂处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與辛巴威市場准入要求對照：SAZ / ZWS標準（採用IEC/SANS）、進口符合性檢驗、能效標識/MEPS計畫、ZWS/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求及R-600a製冷劑處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Zimbabwe legislation, SAZ / ZWS standards, import inspection and conformity-assessment procedures, energy-labelling provisions, and refrigerant requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行津巴布韦法律、SAZ / ZWS标准、进口检验与合格评定程序、能效标识条款及制冷剂要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行辛巴威法律、SAZ / ZWS標準、進口檢驗與合格評定程序、能效標識條款及製冷劑要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face several Zimbabwe market-access gaps: (1) electrical safety must be demonstrated against ZWS / IEC 60335-2-24 (adopted via SAZ from IEC, often aligned with SANS) — Chinese CCC / GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically accepted and import conformity inspection may apply; (2) energy-efficiency labelling / MEPS programmes are developing in Zimbabwe (SAZ / ZERA), so exporters should confirm the current label and minimum-performance requirements rather than relying on the China Energy Label; (3) market access runs through SAZ conformity assessment plus an in-country importer, with goods routed via Durban or Beira as Zimbabwe is landlocked; (4) the grid is 230 V / 50 Hz — the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so rating-plate and tolerance verification is needed. R-600a refrigerant is well-suited; charge and documentation should be checked against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex. Zimbabwe has no EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临若干津巴布韦市场准入差距：（1）电气安全须依据ZWS / IEC 60335-2-24（由SAZ采用IEC、常与SANS对齐）证明——中国CCC / GB 4706.13认证不被自动接受，且可能适用进口符合性检验；（2）津巴布韦的能效标识/MEPS计划（SAZ / ZERA）正在发展中，出口商应核实现行标签及最低能效要求，而非依赖中国能效标识；（3）市场准入须经SAZ合格评定并由境内进口商办理，由于津巴布韦为内陆国，货物经德班或贝拉港转运；（4）电网为230 V / 50 Hz——50 Hz频率与中国相同，但额定电压与中国220/380 V不同，须核实铭牌及电压容差。R-600a制冷剂适用性良好；充注量及文件应依据IEC 60335-2-24附件核实。津巴布韦无类似欧盟的RoHS/电池/室外噪声横向法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨若干辛巴威市場准入差距：（1）電氣安全須依據ZWS / IEC 60335-2-24（由SAZ採用IEC、常與SANS對齊）證明——中國CCC / GB 4706.13認證不被自動接受，且可能適用進口符合性檢驗；（2）辛巴威的能效標識/MEPS計畫（SAZ / ZERA）正在發展中，出口商應核實現行標籤及最低能效要求，而非依賴中國能效標識；（3）市場准入須經SAZ合格評定並由境內進口商辦理，由於辛巴威為內陸國，貨物經德班或貝拉港轉運；（4）電網為230 V / 50 Hz——50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但額定電壓與中國220/380 V不同，須核實銘牌及電壓容差。R-600a製冷劑適用性良好；充注量及文件應依據IEC 60335-2-24附件核實。辛巴威無類似歐盟的RoHS/電池/室外噪聲橫向法規。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (SAZ, ZERA, POTRAZ), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
